overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from a Batman game showing a rainy night in Gotham City. The camera moves through wet streets past the Gotham Herald building, encountering NPCs and vehicles in a dark, neon-lit urban environment with heavy rain and reflective surfaces.

dissolve transition effect to new location

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a rainy night in a commercial street. A character runs across the wet asphalt from left to right while the camera remains stationary. Shop signs for La Tapastry and The Sexting are visible on either side of the street.

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the camera surveys a wide urban intersection dominated by a gothic clock tower and the Gotham Herald building. The camera pans slowly to the right, revealing wet streets reflecting the street lamps and the art deco architecture.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along the rain-soaked street, passing under a large red banner suspended overhead. The Gotham Herald building remains visible on the left while a parked taxi and neon storefronts line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with newspaper building and evacuation signage

red sedan drives through the intersection from right to left

segments.scene_description: The camera settles at a street corner where the Gotham Herald building dominates the left side. A group of NPCs engage in combat on the corner while a large Mandatory Evacuation sign is visible on the right. A red car drives through the wet intersection as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked commercial district that evolves from a quiet street into a chaotic urban intersection. It begins with a stationary view of a character sprinting across wet asphalt between the neon signs of La Tapastry and The Sexting. As the perspective shifts, the camera pans across a wide intersection dominated by a gothic clock tower and the art deco facade of the Gotham Herald building, capturing the glow of street lamps reflecting off the pavement. The movement then pushes forward under a large suspended red banner, gliding past a parked taxi and vibrant storefronts while the Herald building remains a constant landmark on the left. Finally, the camera settles at a street corner where the scene opens up to reveal a group of NPCs engaged in combat beneath a Mandatory Evacuation sign as a red car drives through the heavy rain.
